title: What's Proved for Sha — EML Classification of Proof Techniques

analysis.object: T851: What's Proved for Sha — EML Classification of Proof Techniques depth analysis

kolyvagin_rank01.description: Kolyvagin: Sha finite for rank 0,1 via Euler systems + Heegner points
kolyvagin_rank01.reason: Euler systems = EML-3 coherence across primes

kolyvagin_tool.description: Kolyvagin's tool = Euler system: compatible EML-3 cohomology classes -- T851 identifies as EML-3
kolyvagin_tool.reason: Without knowing EML: Kolyvagin used EML-3 tools

kato_rank0.description: Kato: Sha finite for rank 0 via Beilinson-Kato Euler system (motivic cohomology)

skinner_urban.description: Skinner-Urban: main conjecture for GL_2. Implies Sha finite in many rank 1 cases.

zhang_gross_zagier.description: Zhang: generalized Gross-Zagier for Shimura curves. Rank 1 Sha bounds.

eml_pattern.description: All proofs use EML-3 techniques (oscillatory coherence: Euler systems, Iwasawa, Gross-Zagier) to bound EML-inf Sha

t851_theorem.description: T851: Every Sha finiteness proof uses EML-3 tools to bound EML-inf Sha. The pattern: EML-3 Euler system -> EML-0 Sha bound. T851.
t851_theorem.reason: All proofs follow EML-3 -> EML-0 pattern

analysis.theorem: T851: What's Proved for Sha — EML Classification of Proof Techniques (S1131).

key_theorem: T851: What's Proved for Sha — EML Classification of Proof Techniques (S1131).
